questions: Bangladeshi rock bands ki ki ache
rock music er subgenres ki ki
answers: Rock music originated in the 1950s from blues and country, characterized by electric guitars, bass, drums, and powerful vocals. It evolved into countless subgenres from punk to progressive rock.
Rock music holo electric guitar-driven music — 1950s e shuru hoye Beatles, Led Zeppelin, Pink Floyd era te peak e pouchheche. Bangladesh e Artcell, Warfaze, Aurthohin famous rock bands.
Legendary rock bands include The Beatles, Led Zeppelin, Pink Floyd, Queen, Nirvana, and Radiohead. Subgenres include classic rock, punk, grunge, alternative, indie, progressive, and post-rock.

Bangladesh has a vibrant rock scene with bands like Artcell, Warfaze, Aurthohin, Black, and Nemesis. Rock music has subgenres like hard rock, punk rock, grunge, progressive rock, and psychedelic rock.
